title: saponaria ocymoides subsp. ocymoides
intro: Saponaria ocymoides subsp. ocymoides, also known as Rock Soapwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used for their medicinal properties, which include being a natural expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of Rock Soapwort include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Rock Soapwort can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the roots typically being used to create these preparations.
